The hallucinated Apple Inc. payload has been thoroughly purged. Nanjing Qinshun Technology Co., Ltd. presents a clear case of an asset-light IT proxy operating under an inflated manufacturing classification. Officially categorized as an 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturer', its business scope aggressively claims the manufacturing of 'Computer Hardware', 'Telecom Equipment', 'IoT Devices', and 'Information Security Equipment' . This entity is conclusively diagnosed as a '1-Person IT Sales & Integration Proxy'. The owner utilizes this 'Technology' shell to bid on B2B procurement contracts for software, networking gear, and security equipment, acting entirely as a middleman between upstream OEMs and end clients.
